_meta.note: Single source of truth for the Katha booking flow. Render UI from this; never hardcode. Tiers/add-ons/prices are REAL, scraped 2026-07-02 from client.kathabooth.com/public/inquiry-form and confirmed by Jed. Present with the Roasted Archive aesthetic but do not alter names/prices/inclusions.
_meta.serviceAreaLong: Serving Los Angeles & Orange County — from Carson and the South Bay through Orange County.
_meta.emailFromNote: hello@kathabooth.com is NOT a verified Resend sender yet. Client-facing emails (brochure/invoice/contract) come from HoneyBook, not this site. This site only self-notifies Katha, which works from onboarding@resend.dev. To send client email from hello@kathabooth.com later, verify the kathabooth.com domain in Resend.

seo.note: Emit a LocalBusiness JSON-LD script for SEO/AIO. Specific place names beat 'Southern California'.

integrations.payments_and_legal: STRICTLY HoneyBook. Invoice + contract + payment stay in HoneyBook via its native embedded Lead Form + workflows. This site does NOT process payments or contracts.
integrations.honeybookLeadForm: Recommended handoff: the booking 'Secure Dates' CTA routes the inquiry into HoneyBook's embedded Lead Form so HoneyBook fires brochure->invoice->contract->payment natively. Supabase also stores the lead for the availability admin + records.
integrations.HONEYBOOK_LEAD_FORM: PLACEHOLDER — Jed pastes the HoneyBook Lead Form URL or embed snippet here. Jed builds the form + its brochure/invoice/contract/payment workflow INSIDE HoneyBook. Fable 5 only wires this single value into the branded 'Reserve' seam (PRD 14.1a). Prefill across the seam is NOT reliable — keep the HoneyBook form short so clients don't re-type everything.
integrations.makeDotCom: NOT viable for the HoneyBook bridge — HoneyBook has NO Make.com connector (native integrations are QuickBooks, Gmail, Calendly, Facebook, Zapier only). Make free tier is fine for OPTIONAL side automations off Supabase (e.g. new lead -> Google Sheet / SMS), never in the money/legal path.
integrations.zapier: Avoid — requires a paid HoneyBook/Zapier tier. Not needed given the native Lead Form path.

supabase.note: anonKey/publishableKey are SAFE to ship in client JS (RLS protects data). The SERVICE_ROLE key is NEVER here — it lives only in Vercel env for the serverless /api/lead function. Client calendar + admin auth use the anon/publishable key; lead inserts go through the serverless fn.

motionLaw.reducedMotion: wrap timelines in gsap.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)') AND add a reduce-branch that force-reveals ticket folds (opacity:1,rotateX:0), parts/hides shutter blades, and reveals the wordmark

texture.grain: feTurbulence fractalNoise baseFrequency=0.85 numOctaves=3 stitchTiles=stitch, rect opacity~0.03 (all steps, aria-hidden)
texture.wabiSabiWordmarkFilter: feTurbulence fractalNoise baseFrequency='0.03 0.06' numOctaves=3 -> feDisplacementMap scale=4 xChannel=R yChannel=G (WORDMARK ONLY)

addons.name: Bespoke Backdrop
addons.note: A stylish, high-quality backdrop to match your event's theme. Flower wall not included.

addons.name: White Flower Backdrop
addons.note: A gorgeous white flower backdrop to elevate your event's ambiance. Perfect for weddings and social gatherings.

intakeFields.note: Match the real HoneyBook inquiry form. Core columns (client_name/email/phone/venue/event_date) map to leads; the rest fold into leads.notes as JSON and/or selections.

customizer.note: MATCH the prior book.kathabooth.com model (photobooth-template-studio). Do NOT use the flattened 2-format placeholder. Live preview slots + text zone are positioned as PERCENTAGES of the layout viewBox.
authorityFiles: photobooth-template-studio/lib/layouts.js (LAYOUT REGISTRY — slot + textZone rectangles per arrangement, 300-DPI viewBox; single source of slot math)
photobooth-template-studio/lib/templates.ts (48 'Katha Signature —' PRESETS: id, type, layoutId, colors, fontFamily, decorative SVG)
customizer.model: gallery of real presets -> pick a style -> personalize names/date/venue (+font, text-position) -> faithful live preview from layout geometry -> optional reference-photo upload to Supabase Storage
customizer.slotRender: left = slot.x/viewBox.w*100, top = slot.y/viewBox.h*100, w = slot.w/viewBox.w*100, h = slot.h/viewBox.h*100. Slots stay EMPTY (client's booth photos print there).
customizer.referenceUpload: Supabase Storage refs/<uuid>.<ext>; path stored on selections.reference_photos[]; base64 fallback

portfolio.note: Real Katha booth stock (from kathabooth@gmail.com Drive). Use in a gallery + hero atmosphere + optionally tier cards. NEVER inside customizer preview slots. Path: assets/portfolio/

step1.headline: Check availability. Reserve the night.
step1.sub: Oak-wood DSLR and modern installations that frame quiet, high-contrast portrait captures. Select your installation below.

step2.headline: Design Your Commemorative Card.
step2.sub: Compose the text layers and pick a physical paper hue. Live proof updates instantly.

step3.headline: Inquiry Registered & Secured.
step3.sub: Your requested date is logged. We'll review availability and reply from hello@kathabooth.com with a detailed proposal.

copy.privacyLine: We use your details to respond to your inquiry and, if you opt in, to share occasional Katha offers. Unsubscribe anytime.
copy.marketingConsentLabel: Keep me posted on Katha offers & availability (optional).

leadsColumns.note: Insert ONLY these columns into Supabase `leads`. Verified 2026-07-02 (39 rows, all columns present). Design data goes to the `selections` table (FK selections.lead -> leads.lead_hash), not leads.

leads.event_date: STATE.date as ISO 'YYYY-MM-DD' string (column is TEXT, NOT NULL)
leads.notes: JSON.stringify({eventType, indoorsOutdoors, startTime, guestCount, howHeard, specialNotes, priceQuoted})

selections_optional.note: If you also persist the Step-2 design, write a row to `selections` after the design step. lead = leads.lead_hash.

availability.model: ALLOW-LIST (admin portal). The studio marks dates OPEN in the admin portal; the public calendar shows only OPEN, future, non-booked dates as selectable.
availability.publicRead: GET {url}/rest/v1/available_dates?select=date,status  with apikey + Authorization Bearer = anonKey. RLS allows public SELECT.
availability.adminWrite: admin.html: Supabase Auth magic link -> RLS (is_admin()) permits insert/update/delete. Admins seeded in public.admins.

openDecisions.submitTransport: serverless + supabase (WIRED). Add SUPABASE service-role/secret + RESEND_API_KEY to the katha-booking-html Vercel project env.
openDecisions.emailFrom: onboarding@resend.dev (self-notify works). Client emails via HoneyBook. Verify kathabooth.com in Resend only if you later want client email from hello@kathabooth.com.
openDecisions.admins: kathabooth@gmail.com (shared business inbox — covers Jed + brother; no second admin needed)
openDecisions.analytics: Vercel Web Analytics (free on Hobby) — add the one-line script
openDecisions.paymentsAndLegal: HoneyBook only (native Lead Form + workflows). No Zapier, no Make in the money/legal path.
